name: PneumokokkenVaccins
title: Pneumokokken Vaccins (ATC J07AH)
description: Pneumokokkenvaccins conform ATC-klasse J07AH. Omvat polysacharidevaccins (PPV23) en geconjugeerde vaccins (PCV13, PCV15, PCV20).

concept.display: Pneumococcal vaccine, purified polysaccharides antigen conjugated (PCV13)
Pneumococcal vaccine, purified polysaccharides antigen, 15-valent conjugated (PCV15)
Pneumococcal vaccine, purified polysaccharides antigen, 20-valent conjugated (PCV20)
